name: ?KEYEvent@@YAXIIJ@Z
notes: WM_(SYS)KEYDOWN/UP hook: scan from lParam, qualifier bits (1=shift 2=ctrl 4=alt) in _qualStatus/_keyFlags, _keyarray[scan] held state, kbScanToASCII translate (hi-byte=bare ASCII code, lo-byte=keypad normalize, none=scan<<8|qual), 16-entry _kbBuffer ring; drops auto-repeats of _ignoreRepeats scans in flight
type: void __cdecl KEYEvent(unsigned int, unsigned int, long)

name: _KEYECS
notes: enter the keyboard critical section (0x522558) if initialized

name: _KEYLCS
notes: leave the keyboard critical section

name: _KEYPause
notes: flush keyboard state: kbBuffer ring ptrs, _keyarray[256], qualifier bits

name: @PutFakeKey@4
notes: push a synthetic key code onto the 8-entry fake-key stack (0x5226b0); UI/joystick inject commands this way

name: _GetFakeKey@0
notes: pop the fake-key stack (0 when empty); polled after GetKey by the shell screens

name: _WaitKey
notes: spin (Sleep 0) until GetKey returns a key

name: _SlewKey
notes: slew-mode key dispatch: keypad 8/2/4/6 translate, 9/3 altitude, ctrl+7/9 heading +/-364 (2 deg), keypad-0 speed x2, keypad-. speed /2 (min 0x100), ctrl+S next slewable object (obj flag bit0 via T_ObjList), Esc exit; consumed keys return 0

name: SlewObjListCollect
notes: T_ObjList visitor for SlewKey ctrl+S: append object id to the bounded id list at 0x522c1c/0x522c24

name: @FlightKey@4
notes: THE in-flight command table: offers the key to the stick/rudder/throttle device procs (msg 3) then dispatches ~70 commands - flight controls (a/b/f/g/h/o), sensors (r/i/m/y, Shift+R A/G, Shift+A AWACS, Shift+G GCI), targeting (Enter/t/T/;), weapons ([ ] Space Tab, keypad-Ins chaff keypad-Del flare, Shift+J/K jettison), wingman Alt+letters + Alt+1..9 break angles, Shift+digit MFD windows, Ctrl+keypad thrust vector, Shift+E eject (double-press). See input.md section

name: PickVisibleTarget
notes: filter _visibleTargetIds by Targetable, then param!=0: nearest to screen centre (boresight), param==0: next in raster order after the current target

name: NextTargetOnScreen
notes: raster-order scan of on-screen target positions; returns the id following the reference position, skipping the current target

name: PickVisibleContact
notes: radar-contact twin of PickVisibleTarget over CPGetContact/_numContacts (/ and \ keys, realistic-avionics pref)

name: NextContactOnScreen
notes: raster-order scan over contact screen positions; returns CPGetContact(best)

name: WngAttackTarget
notes: order wingman vs the player target: hostile check (side byte objPtrs[id]+9 XOR player side, bit 0x80), optional WNGSetControl, MSGSend cmd 0xb with target id (0x1fffffff = engage at will); Alt+E(1,1)/Alt+R(2,1)

name: WngAttackContact
notes: same as WngAttackTarget but for the radar _contactId (Alt+F)

name: @SetAutopilot@8
notes: set/clear plane-flags bit 0x1000 (autopilot); on engage WPSetupCurrent(0)+AutopilotEngage, on disengage CancelCmdBuf; clears bit 0x2000 (forced) when off

name: AutopilotEngage
notes: autopilot engage bootstrap: EnterState(0x1f) if beyond, temporarily clear target, PLANEEventProc(0x80), CallUtilProc/MoveObj/ReadCmdBuf priming

name: @ForceAutopilot@4
notes: engage autopilot marking it forced (bit 0x2000) - used by menus/eject/hook-catch

name: _RestoreAutopilot@0
notes: disengage a forced autopilot (bit 0x2000 set) only

name: _ServicePlayer@0
notes: per-frame player service: forced-AP when dead, stick decay under time compression, DAMAGEUpdate, target FOV re-check (pref 0x10000000), autopilot maintenance, FMFlight tick + crash dispatch (PLANECrash, crash-landed score -2), arrestor-hook catch (Collision type 0x84, HOOK_5K, state 0x16), waypoint auto-advance (WP+0x44 stride, passed bit 0x80), collision MSGSend 0x4000 + Kill, afterburner/engine sounds, trigger logic (_weaponButton/_gunButton -> PROJFire, bay-door + refire checks), brake button edges

name: PlayerDriveVehicle
notes: non-plane player control: stick -> CreateMove turn (COTurnRate, reversed in reverse) + speed (COMaxSpeed, half max reverse)

name: PlayerUpdateState
notes: the player plane auto state machine: on ground - auto-rearm, catapult (APTakeoffType 7 -> state 7 + forced AP), takeoff roll 0x11, taxi 1, parking 0x1a-0x1e; in air - approach/landing 0x12/0x14 near airport w/ gear, else free flight 0x1f, engage 0x20; skips the ~BGUN.PT fort gun

name: PlayerAutoRearm
notes: stationary at a friendly airport within 0x64000: HARDRearmTest/HARDRearmHumanLoad (fort variants on fort missions) + SAYRearmMessage

name: PlayerNeedsRearm
notes: rearm-needed test: drop-tank fuel sum + base tankage vs HARDTotalFuel, threshold 0x15e

name: PlayerPickParking
notes: nearest of the airport 4 parking points (apt+0x62/0x74/0x86/0x98) -> states 0x1b..0x1e (1 when already 0x1a)

name: PlayerPickParkingAlt
notes: alternate entry of PlayerPickParking (reference point in EAX); overlapping-entry pair
interior of / adjacent to caseD_3; named at its base or owned by that subsystem

name: _InitPlayerControl@0
notes: load vis240.SEE into the 57-byte view/visibility block 0x4ee348, deviceProc(0) init for stick/rudder/throttle, clear buttons + coolie state, throttle from entity+0x1f2

name: _InputCalibrate
notes: deviceProc(1) calibrate for one device + ensure the shell mouse is shown

name: _GetPlayerControl@0
notes: per-frame control poll: ReadSticksRaw + deviceProc(2) stick/rudder/throttle + KeyStick(2,0) so Space/Tab always latch fire buttons

name: ?KeyStick@@YAGFG@Z
notes: keyboard stick device proc: msg2 latches Space=_weaponButton Tab=_gunButton from _keyarray, arrows = full deflection +/-0x100 (shift reserved for views, alt+arrows reserved for TV); msg3 passes keys through

name: _Slew@16
notes: compose yaw/pitch view offsets with object attitude via rotation matrices + ArcTan -> euler view angles (padlock/slew view math)

name: @ReadSticksRaw@0
notes: poll X/throttle/rudder/POV via ReadDevice gated by joystickFunctions bits (1/4/8/0x10)

name: _InitJoysticks@0
notes: joyGetNumDevs (cap 16); probe each joyGetPos+joyGetDevCapsA(0x194) into joystickCaps; build joystickMask; assign X/Y/throttle/rudder/POV device roles -> joystickFunctions

name: ?GetJoystickType@@YA?AW4JOYRESULT@@K@Z
notes: JOYRESULT enum: 4=uninit 3=absent 0=legacy(JOYINFO) 1=extended(JOYINFOEX); decides by caps axes<3 && buttons<4

name: ?ReadDevice@@YA?AW4JOYRESULT@@K@Z
notes: read one device joyGetPos/joyGetPosEx into joystickInfo/Ex[id]; 50ms (0x32) rate-limit via joystickLastRead + timeGetTime

name: ?ScaleToRange@@YGJMMMMMMD@Z
notes: clamp/scale a float axis into calibrated min/center/max range via __ftol; stack-arg helper for NormalizeStick
type: long __stdcall ScaleToRange(float, float, float, float, float, float, char)

name: @NormalizeStick@16
notes: normalize X/Y/throttle/rudder to ints; first-read center auto-capture (gotCenterX/Y/R -> DAT_00554ec4/ec8/ebc); calls ScaleToRange
Ghidra split alt-entry into @NormalizeStick@16 (0x4946B0) — same body via register-entry; computed/mid-function split

name: @GetPOV@0
notes: read POV hat; map centidegrees/100 to keypad scancode 0x48/0x4D/0x50/0x4B (U/R/D/L); 0xFFFF=centered->0

name: @ASynchJoystick@0
notes: poll buttons via ReadJoystickButtons; edge-detect new presses into buttonPresses[] per JOYCAPS button count

name: @ReadJoystickButtons@0
notes: return button mask from joystickInfo+0x14 (legacy) or joystickInfoEx+0x28 (extended)

name: _MOUSESetLimits@8
notes: set cursor clamp limits (mouse-ring limit fields DAT_00560f38/f3a)

name: _MOUSESetPos@8
notes: center mousePos to screen/2 (DAT_0055c06a/c06c halved)

name: _MOUSECenter
notes: FA.SMS symbol at 0x499d40 not split by current Ghidra inventory; ~16-byte helper between MOUSESetPos and MOUSERead — candidate to define; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _MOUSERead@8
notes: dequeue next event from 16-entry ring (critical-section); returns queued pos+buttons or current mousePos/mouseButtons if empty

name: _MOUSEInit@0
notes: InitializeCriticalSection(mouse_critical_section); reset ring indices; set initialized flag DAT_00501598

name: _MOUSEShutdown
notes: DeleteCriticalSection(mouse_critical_section) if initialized; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: ?MOUSEEvent@@YIXIIJ@Z
notes: WndProc mouse handler WM_MOUSEMOVE/L/R DOWN+UP (0x200/201/202/204/205); edge-count mouseButtonPresses & DAT_00560ef1; push to ring; update mousePos
type: void __fastcall MOUSEEvent(unsigned int, unsigned int, long)

notes: Ghidra split alt-entry into ?MOUSEEvent@@YIXIIJ@Z (0x499E50) — same switch body via register-entry

name: ?RunSerialConfigurationScreen@@YGXXZ
notes: large device-config dialog for direct-serial link (baud/port/etc.); ~5.4KB UI — could alternatively be shell-ui

name: ?RunModemConfigurationScreen@@YGXXZ
notes: large device-config dialog for modem link (init string/dial/port); ~2.6KB UI — could alternatively be shell-ui
